tagline: The 5X Large cluster size for serverless and pro SQL warehouses is in Public Preview in all regions.
what_it_does: The 5X Large cluster size for serverless and pro SQL warehouses is in Public Preview in all regions. The 5X Large size provides 512 workers. Workspace admins can control access to this feature from the Previews page.
why_it_matters: This article explains how to size, scale, and manage query queues for Databricks SQL warehouses to optimize performance and cost.

capabilities.title: If capacity exists, the query
capabilities.desc: If capacity exists, the query starts immediately.

capabilities.title: If not, the query is
capabilities.desc: If not, the query is placed in a queue. IWM continuously monitors the queue. If wait times increase, the autoscaler quickly…

key_takeaway: The 5X Large cluster size for serverless and pro SQL warehouses is in Public Preview in all regions.
